name: Exotic KV Cache Types on Qwen3.5-122B
hypothesis: Beyond f16/q8_0/q4_0, types iq4_nl, q5_0, q5_1, and q4_1 have dramatically different Vulkan kernel characteristics. Mapping them on 122B reveals a hidden sweet spot.
notes: Small-model probe: q5_1 pp=497 vs q5_0 pp=108 — 4.6x asymmetry despite 1 extra bit. iq4_nl pp=232, tg=24 clean. Likely the NL kernel is faster than the block-scale kernel for reads.
